name: Build OCI Task
description: Build an OCI container image from source code

sourceCode.description: Source code to include in the container

imageName.description: Name of the image to build

imageHash.description: SHA256 hash of the built image

implementation: async (input) => { const crypto = await import('crypto'); const hash = crypto.default.createHash('sha256').update(input.sourceCode).digest('hex').slice(0, 12); return { success: true, imageHash: hash, imageSpecifier: `docker.io/library/${input.imageName || 'sequential-task'}:${input.tag || 'latest'}`, digest: `sha256:${hash}`, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }; }
